subcodes.first_line: O God, O Thou Who art the Cleaver of Dawn, the Quickener of spirits and the Creator of forms, all doors have been closed before me [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: اللهم یا فالق الاصباح و محیی الارواح و منشا الاشباح قد سدت علی کل الابواب
subcodes.subjects: @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @prayer for steadfastness; obedience, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
